tests.description: ATDD RED backend service tests for Story 6.1 ThinkTank usage aggregation, instrumentation gaps, privacy, and freshness.
acceptance_criteria_covered: AC1: usage by workflow type, Quick Consult volume, starts, completions, incomplete sessions, tenant/date filtering
AC2: Story 1.4 versioned event contract and malformed/unknown event gap handling
AC3: low-completion workflow detection and privacy-safe aggregate drilldown
AC4: delayed/unavailable telemetry freshness state instead of misleading zeros

tests.description: ATDD RED backend controller tests for Story 6.1 GET /advisory/admin/operations/usage envelope, query delegation, guards, and route metadata.
acceptance_criteria_covered: AC1: operator endpoint supports tenant/date filters according to permissions
AC4: endpoint returns dashboard data envelope including freshness/unavailable state

tests.description: ATDD RED HTTP API contract tests for Story 6.1 operations usage endpoint response shape, auth, privacy, gaps, and freshness.
acceptance_criteria_covered: AC1: GET /advisory/admin/operations/usage returns usage and completion metrics with tenant/date filters
AC2: instrumentation gaps are represented explicitly
AC3: response is aggregate-only and excludes raw private conversation content
AC4: freshness/unavailable status is part of the API contract

provider_scrutiny_notes: Existing Story 1.4 provider source reviewed: ThinkTankEventName and THINKTANK_EVENT_VERSION from backend/src/modules/advisory/events/thinktank-event-contract.ts.
Existing event registry reviewed: workflow, quick consult, and party mode event names are registered in backend/src/modules/advisory/events/thinktank-event-registry.ts.
New provider endpoint documented as TODO in controller and HTTP API contract tests: GET /advisory/admin/operations/usage.
Expected response shape and privacy assumptions are derived from Story 6.1 acceptance criteria and implementation notes.
summary: Generated 11 skipped RED phase API/backend tests for Story 6.1 covering service aggregation, controller routing/envelope/guards, and HTTP API contract privacy/freshness semantics.
